meta.title: Greenville Landscaping Near Me | Expert Lawn Care in Greenville SC
meta.description: Greenville Landscaping Near Me offers top-rated lawn care services in Greenville, SC, including mowing, edging, hedge trimming, weed treatment, and more. Discover customizable year-round packages for a lush, healthy lawn.

secciones.titulo: Packages That Fit The Needs of Every Customer
secciones.contenido: Committed to excellence and personalized care, we work with our customers to improve and maintain their property. We make sure we understand the customer's needs and vision, gather property information, solve any site challenges and select the right materials for each project.

52 Visits a Year. 52 weeks of the year, our crew will deliver tailored landscape services. Weekly / Bi-Weekly. Our crew will deliver weekly tailored services during the growing season and biweekly services during the non-growing season.

26 Visits a Year. 26 weeks of the year, our crew will deliver tailored landscape services. Bi-Weekly / Monthly. 19 Visits a Year. Our crew will deliver bi-weekly tailored services during the growing season and monthly services during the non-growing season.
We offer both weekly and biweekly year round service tailored to your landscape needs.
Only need us seasonally? We offer weekly and biweekly service during the growing season.
Give us a call and we will put together a custom quote specific to your landscape needs.
secciones.cta: Call us today for an estimate: (864) 794-1315

secciones.contenido:
Robert C. — Used this company to have compost and mulch laid around my home. Paige maintained great communication on the project and Jackie and the Landscaping crew did an excellent job. Would highly recommend this company!

Hunter G. — They have always gone above and beyond to get something done right when needed. Would highly recommend working with them.

Tara D. — Professional and reliable. Maintained our property efficiently and we never had any trouble with scheduling. Highly recommend

Terry D. — We were so happy with the work that Greenville Landscaping Near Me did a few weeks ago, we asked them back to complete a tough leaf removal in our back yard.
